claim_boundary: This records one retained-RID update from commit 610fc3da9757d0cb123aa5976db552b991b766d4 to 64efbada294d4a57c014a27398b92e344c6d68aa, a temporary maintainer-seed bridge used to let the openclaw follower sync it, bridge and maintainer shutdown afterward, and a fresh public direct-seed readback from openclaw at the updated commit. It is not proof of automatic future propagation, permanent durability, security, identity trust, global replication, default public routing, or production readiness.
